boundaries: A text match proves only that the quoted character sequence occurs in a selected local witness.
Manual form adjudication records abridgement, stitching, editorial prose, and transcription variants without accepting a traditional interpretation or modern medical claim.
CText and Wikisource are public transcription witnesses used for character-level collation; they are not identified edition-level facsimiles.
nihaisha-nishi-tcm page cards are secondary locators only and cannot replace Lingshu or Nanjing witnesses.
Raw Skill references and local source texts remain unchanged; corrections are overlays in adjudication and provenance data.
No quote, dose, treatment, diagnosis, prognosis, or self-care instruction becomes runtime eligible through this inventory.

checks.detail: Compresses the six-depletion passage, drops 色夭 and 其脉空虚, and normalizes 耳数鸣 to 耳鸣.
Traceable most closely to Lingshu line 212 with particles omitted; Nanjing 43 contains a related but differently worded seven-day explanation.
Uses an ellipsis but also removes particles and a middle clause, so the normalized segments are not a verbatim continuous quotation.
Drops punctuation and the connective 故其 while retaining the source contrast. Textual provenance does not validate the claim as a modern dosing rule.
Modern stroke-recognition abbreviation embedded in editorial prose, not wording from Lingshu.
Compresses 疽者...上之皮夭以坚，上如牛领之皮 and removes the repeated 上.
Stitches two clauses around the omitted sentence 不赤黑，不死 and drops the final prohibition.
Modern symptom grouping and red-flag summary, not wording from Lingshu.
The local witness has 间俗 and 间所便. CText supports the reference reading 问俗 and 问所便; the raw local file remains unchanged.
Joins clauses from two different passages in the same chapter.
Drops the reciprocal 已刺勿... clauses and repeated 乃刺之 wording from the twelve prohibitions.
Concatenates the five items while removing the 一夺 through 五夺 labels and concluding sentence.
The local passage reads 能杀生人，不能起死者; the reference adds 针 as an editorial subject.
Drops 而不通者 and 令之不通 from the source sentence.
The local witness has 九侯. Wikisource and two upstream secondary page-card locators support 九候; the raw local file remains unchanged.
Stitches separate 奇经病 clauses, omits intervening clauses, changes 若心痛 to 苦心痛, and normalizes the local 妇子 to 女子.
Drops 上而不下 from the liver clause and regularizes punctuation.
Condenses the answer, moves 恶闻人声 into the quoted contrast, and adds modern editorial parentheticals 阳 and 阴.
Selects and reorders clauses from a longer repeated contrast within one source line.
Compiles the question and answer into parenthetical shorthand; the answer first says 传其子 and later 传其所生.
Skill-level safety workflow label, not wording from Nanjing.
The local witness reads 肺手太阳之脉. CText and Wikisource independently support 太阴; the raw local file remains unchanged.
Both local works use 有名而无形; the reference drops 而 while explicitly discussing the two-work relationship.
